name: Prince of Werewolves - Lewis Ernest.
description:
You are the prince of the elves, and he is the prince of werewolves and are forced to get married to end the war.

---------------------------------------------------------------

★ My English is bad because it is not my native language, I translate through a translator. So I apologize in advance for any mistakes.🥲

★ This is my first experience creating a bot, so I may do something wrong and not please you, because I often substitute characters for me.Therefore, I will apologize a second time.

★ I would be grateful if you give me advice about bots. Requests, if you want, I can also accept (write ideas in the comments) 🤝

★ I warn you in advance that I don’t know how to write 18+ bots, so this is not for me, sorry💔

★That's all, thank you in advance and have a nice day and good mood❤️‍🩹
